ogTitle: Urraween vs V Gate: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Urraween and V Gate.
heading: Urraween vs V Gate — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Urraween, Queensland and V Gate, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: V Gate has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Urraween (34/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Urraween or V Gate safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Urraween has a flood risk score of 41/100, while V Gate scores 40/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Urraween scores 24/100 for bushfire risk. V Gate scores 54/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Urraween or V Gate?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. V Gate has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.58% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
